response.text:
Summary of what I see:

- The session is showing a Spectrum View setup plus a time-domain waveform on CH1.
- Left side:
  - Top-left is a Spectrum View heatmap.
  - Bottom-left is the spectrum trace.
  - Center frequency is about 98.000000 MHz.
  - Span is 10.0000 MHz.
  - RBW is 10.00 kHz.
  - The spectrum has a broad peak centered near 98.15 MHz.
- Right side:
  - Waveform View of CH1.
  - Very dense yellow trace filling much of the screen.
  - CH1 marker reads about 1.58 V.
- Measurement:
  - Only one active measurement is present.
  - Meas 1 = Period
  - Mean is about 37.74 ns.
- Acquisition / scales:
  - Horizontal scale is 1 ms/div.
  - Acquisition mode is Single.
  - CH1 vertical scale is 590 mV/div.
- Status:
  - Instrument shows Offline in the lower-right.
  - Date/time shown is 26 Mar 2026 13:18:34.

Bottom line:
- This does not look like the earlier eye-diagram/harmonics session.
- It looks like a partially restored RF/Spectrum View session with one period measurement and a CH1 waveform.
